headline: America Now Has an EV Rust Belt. High Gas Prices Won’t Rescue It.
summary: GM supplier Magna is stuck with a plant built to churn out parts for battery-powered pickups. “The magnitude of uncertainty is unparalleled,” said its CEO.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think General Motors (GM) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for General Motors (GM) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: GM temporarily lays off 1,300 workers at Factory Zero EV plant
summary: The automaker previously cut around 1,200 jobs, effective Jan. 5, at the former Detroit-Hamtramck Assembly plant it converted to produce EVs.

headline: The U.S. and China Are in a Strategic Stalemate. What Comes Next.
summary: It’s easy to be a China hawk; the script essentially writes itself.  It’s even easier to be a China dove, clinging to the ghosts of a globalization that no longer exists.  To find that ground, I recently sat down with  Timothy Stratford,  whose career serves as a cross-section of the U.S.-China story itself.

raw.headline: The U.S. and China Are in a Strategic Stalemate. What Comes Next.
